mapping.a_element: the SU(2) group manifold / WZW conformal field theory the D-branes live on
mapping.b_element: the WZW model with chiral algebra g_k whose fusion ring is studied

brief_justification: The overlap is shared setting and vocabulary (WZW models, SU(2)/Lie-algebra fusion rings, CFT), not shared machinery: paper A's results are driven by a Born-Infeld effective-action energy minimization with quantized U(1) flux stabilizing the branes, whereas paper B's are driven by affine-Lie-algebra representation theory (an untwisted affine extension yielding a Racah-Speiser-like branching algorithm and a Verlinde-like formula). No role-for-role correspondence of the governing processes holds.
